debug_info.goal:
case inr
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝⁶ : Fintype ι
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
E : ι → Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : (i : ι) → NormedAddCommGroup (E i)
inst✝⁴ : (i : ι) → NormedSpace ℝ (E i)
inst✝³ : (i : ι) → MeasurableSpace (E i)
inst✝² : ∀ (i : ι), CompleteSpace (E i)
inst✝¹ : ∀ (i : ι), BorelSpace (E i)
inst✝ : ∀ (i : ι), SecondCountableTopology (E i)
X : (i : ι) → Ω → E i
h : ∀ (i : ι), HasGaussianLaw (X i) P
hX : iIndepFun X P
this : IsProbabilityMeasure P
hι : Nonempty ι
⊢ ∃ m f,
    f.toBilinForm.IsPosSemidef ∧
      ∀ (L : StrongDual ℝ ((x : ι) → E x)),
        charFunDual (Measure.map (fun ω x => X x ω) P) L = exp (↑(L m) * I - ↑((f L) L) / 2)

    · have h_sum : (fun ω ↦ L (fun i ↦ X i ω)) = (fun ω ↦ ∑ i, (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)) (X i ω)) := by

      simp_rw [← charFunDual, h_char, ContinuousLinearMap.sum_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply,

      · exact hX.comp (fun i ↦ (by fun_prop))
      · intro i; exact integrable_of_isFinite_measure (by fun_prop)

      rw [charFunDual, integral_map (aemeasurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable) aestronglyMeasurable_id]
      have : (fun x ↦ exp (L x * I)) = (fun x ↦ exp (I * ∑ i, (L.comp (single i)) (x i))) := by

obtain ⟨m, f, hf_psd, h_char⟩ := fun i ↦ (isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual (P.map (X i))).1 (h i).isGaussian_map
    let f' := ∑ i, (single i).dual.dual.comp ((f i).comp (single i).dual)
    use (fun i ↦ m i), f'
    constructor
    · intro L; simp [f', toBilinForm_apply]; exact sum_nonneg (fun i _ ↦ hf_psd i _)
    · intro L
      rw [charFunDual, integral_map (aeMeasurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable) (by fun_prop)]
      set Z := fun i ω ↦ (L.comp (single i)) (X i ω)
      have hZ : ∀ i, AeMeasurable (Z i) P := fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable.apply_continuous (by fun_prop)
      rw [show (fun ω ↦ L (fun i ↦ X i ω)) = (fun ω ↦ ∑ i, Z i ω) by ext; simp [← L.map_sum, ← sum_apply, single_apply],
        ← charFun_map (hZ.sum P), iIndepFun.charFun_sum hZ (hX.comp (fun i ↦ L.comp (single i)) (fun i ↦ (L.comp (single i)).measurable)) 1]
      simp [charFun_map (hZ _), ← integral_map (h _).aemeasurable (by fun_prop), ← charFunDual, h_char, f', ← exp_sum,
        sum_sub_distrib, ← sum_mul, ← sum_div, ← L.map_sum, ← sum_apply, single_apply]

obtain ⟨m, f, hpos, hchar⟩ := fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp (h i).isGaussian_map
    let f' := ContinuousLinearMap.pi fun i ↦ (f i).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i).dualMap
    use fun i ↦ m i, f'
    constructor
    · intro L; rw [ContinuousLinearMap.toBilinForm_apply, ← L.map_sum]
      have : (f' L) = ∑ i, ContinuousLinearMap.single i (f i (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i))) := by
        ext i; simp [f', ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply]
      rw [this, L.map_sum]; apply sum_nonneg; intro i _; exact hpos i _
    · intro L; rw [charFunDual_map (aemeasurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable), charFunDual_apply]
      have h_sum {x} : L x = ∑ i, L (ContinuousLinearMap.single i (x i)) := by
        rw [← L.map_sum]; congr; ext i; simp [ContinuousLinearMap.single_apply, Finset.sum_apply, Finset.sum_ite_eq]
      simp_rw [h_sum, sum_mul, exp_sum, integral_finset_prod (hX.comp (fun i x ↦ exp (L (ContinuousLinearMap.single i x) * I))
        (fun i ↦ (measurable_exp.comp (continuous_ofReal.measurable.mul measurable_const)).comp (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.single i)).continuous.measurable))
        (fun i _ ↦ (IsProbabilityMeasure.isFiniteMeasure).integrable_of_bound (fun _ ↦ (Complex.abs_exp_it _).le))]
      simp_rw [← charFunDual_apply, ← charFunDual_map (h _).aemeasurable, hchar, ← exp_sum, Complex.ofReal_sum]
      congr 1; simp only [sum_sub_distrib, ← sum_mul, h_sum]; congr 2
      simp only [f', ContinuousLinearMap.pi_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_comp', ContinuousLinearMap.dualMap_apply,
        Function.comp_apply, h_sum]

apply isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.mp

choose m f hpos hchar using fun i ↦ (isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (h i).isGaussian_map)
    let F := ∑ i, (single i (E := E)).dualMap.dualMap.comp ((f i).comp (single i (E := E)).dualMap)

    let Li i := L.comp (single i (E := E))
    have h_meas i : AeMeasurable (Li i ∘ X i) P := (Li i).continuous.aemeasurable.comp_aemeasurable (h i).aemeasurable
    simp_rw [charFunDual, (fun ω ↦ L.congr_arg (pi_eq_sum_single (X · ω)).symm), iIndepFun.charFun_sum h_meas (hX.comp (fun i ↦ (Li i).measurable)) 1, charFun, ofReal_one, one_mul, integral_map h_meas aestronglyMeasurable_id, ← charFunDual, hchar, ← exp_sum, Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    simp only [F, sum_apply, coe_comp', dualMap_apply, Function.comp_apply, ofReal_sum, Li]
    congrm exp (?_ * I - ?_ / 2)
    · rw [← L.map_sum, pi_eq_sum_single]
    · rw [← L.map_sum, pi_eq_sum_single]; congr; ext i; simp

rw [hX.map_pi (by fun_prop)]

choose m f hpos hchar using fun i ↦ isGaussian_iff_gaussian_charFunDual.1 (h i).isGaussian_map
    use m, .sum fun i ↦ (single i).dualMap.dualMap.comp ((f i).comp (single i).dualMap)
    constructor
    · intro L; simp [toBilinForm_apply, sum_apply]; exact sum_nonneg fun i _ ↦ hpos i _
    · intro L
      have h_aem : AEMeasurable (fun ω i ↦ X i ω) P := aemeasurable_pi_iff.mpr fun i ↦ (h i).aemeasurable
      rw [charFunDual, integral_map h_aem (by fun_prop)]
      have : (fun ω ↦ exp (I * L (fun i ↦ X i ω))) =ᵐ[P] fun ω ↦ ∏ i, exp (I * L (single i (X i ω))) := by
        filter_upwards with ω; rw [← Complex.exp_sum, ← mul_sum, ← L.map_sum]
        congr 1; ext j; simp
      rw [integral_congr_ae this, iIndepFun.integral_prod]
      · simp_rw [← charFunDual, ← integral_map (h _).aemeasurable (by fun_prop), hchar,
          ← Complex.exp_sum, sum_sub_distrib, ← mul_sum, ← L.map_sum]
        simp [sum_apply]; congr 1
        · ext j; simp
        · ring
      · exact fun _ ↦ this
      · exact iIndepFun.comp hX (fun i ↦ exp (I * L.comp (single i) ·)) fun i ↦ by fun_prop
      · exact fun _ ↦ integrable_of_isFiniteMeasure (by fun_prop)
